title: What’s the human cost of US research turmoil? A new film finds out
summary:
Nature, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01979-7

Science is a complex, interconnected, deeply human enterprise involving hard grind — and funding cuts and grant delays have come as a sucker punch to many.
body: Nature, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01979-7 Science is a complex, interconnected, deeply human enterprise involving hard grind — and funding cuts and grant delays have come as a sucker punch to many.

title: Why Venezuela’s Second Earthquake Was So Damaging to Buildings
summary: Factors like the short interval between the two powerful quakes and different types of soil led to some structures collapsing while others stayed standing.

title: حمى الذهب تصيب المصريين.. إقبال واسع على الشراء
summary: تشهد أسواق الذهب في مصر، حاليا، حمى شراء بعد تراجع الأسعار إلى أقل مستوياتها خلال أكثر من عام، بعد انخفاض سعر عيار 21، الأكثر تداولا في محال الصاغة، من حوالي 145 دولارا في مطلع العام الجاري إلى أقل من حوالي 113 دولارا اليوم الخميس.

title: Crude oil fractionation by means of mesoporous polyacrylonitrile membranes
summary:
Nature, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10677-3

Porous polyacrylonitrile membranes—typically used as non-selective support layers—can be used to achieve effective molecular refining of crude oil at steady …
body: Nature, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10677-3 Porous polyacrylonitrile membranes—typically used as non-selective support layers—can be used to achieve effective molecular refining of crude oil at steady state, enabling substantial reductions in energy consumption, cooling water, and CO2 emissions compared with distillation processes.

title: Crude oil turns cheap porous membrane into a sieve to refine itself without heat
summary:
Nature, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01896-9

An inexpensive, porous polymer membrane helps to separate raw crude oil, without heat or selective coating. Heavy hydrocarbons self-assemble inside the pores…
body: Nature, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01896-9 An inexpensive, porous polymer membrane helps to separate raw crude oil, without heat or selective coating. Heavy hydrocarbons self-assemble inside the pores to create channels that are likely to be less than 2 nanometres wide, enriching the resulting permeate mix into light, ‘naphtha range’ hydrocarbons with 30% less energy cost and carbon dioxide emissions than conventional distillation.

title: التريليون لا يكفي.. لماذا لا يتفوق ماسك على ملك مالي؟
summary: أعاد اكتتاب شركة "سبيس إكس" القياسي، الذي دفع بثروة إيلون ماسك إلى مشارف التريليون دولار، سؤالا قديما إلى الواجهة: هل أصبح مؤسس تسلا وسبيس إكس أغنى رجل في التاريخ، أم أن هذا اللقب ما زال عصيا على مؤشرات البورصة الحديثة بسبب رجل عاش قبل سبعة قرون في غرب إفريقيا: منسا موسى، إمبراطور مالي و"ملك الذهب"…
